sections.heading: Let Your Insurance Support Your Recovery
body: The cost of treatment should never be a barrier to the care you deserve. We are here to help you navigate your coverage so you can focus entirely on your recovery. Our team specializes in maximizing private insurance benefits to ensure your clinical stay at our Des Moines drug rehab is fully supported. Call us today to verify your benefits. 100% free.

sections.heading: The Methamphetamine Crisis in Iowa
body: While national headlines often focus on opioids, methamphetamine remains the most significant public health challenge in the Midwest. In Iowa, the rising purity of meth has led to a surge in addiction and health crises across Des Moines and Polk County. In 2024, psychostimulants, primarily methamphetamine, officially surpassed opioids as the leading cause of overdose deaths in Iowa. Current state reports indicate that 63% of all fatal overdoses in Iowa now involve methamphetamine, a trend fueled by a 54% increase in seizures of extremely high-purity product in 2025.

Because methamphetamine fundamentally alters brain chemistry and the dopamine reward system, professional intervention is essential for a safe and lasting recovery. At Des Moines Wellness Center, we approach meth addiction with a deep understanding of its physiological grip. We utilize advanced clinical protocols for immediate stabilization and the long-term cognitive repair needed to reclaim your life.

sections.heading: Recognizing the Signs: When to Seek Help
body: Methamphetamine addiction often develops rapidly, making early intervention critical for successful recovery. Because the drug drastically impacts the central nervous system, the signs of a burgeoning problem are often visible through sudden changes in personality, physical appearance, and daily habits. Most common signs include:
If you recognize these patterns, we offer same-day assessments to help you determine the next steps. We’re available 24/7 to get you or your loved one the help needed.

items.title: Physical Decline
items.text: Rapid weight loss, skin sores, and dental issues ("meth mouth").

items.title: Sleep Disruption
items.text: Staying awake for days (binging) followed by long periods of crashing.

items.title: Hyperactivity
items.text: Unnatural energy, rapid speech, and involuntary muscle twitching.

items.title: Psychological Shift
items.text: Extreme paranoia, intense irritability, or uncharacteristic aggression.

sections.heading: Medical Detox for Methamphetamine in Des Moines, IOWA
sections.subheading: Managing the Stimulant Crash with Expert Care
body: The crash following methamphetamine use is notoriously intense, characterized by extreme physical exhaustion, severe depression, and acute psychological cravings. Attempting to detox at home often leads to immediate relapse because the neurological pull is too strong to manage alone. At Des Moines Wellness Center, our medically supervised detox provides a safe, low-stimulus environment where your physical and mental health are monitored 24/7. Our focus during this critical window is:

items.title: 1. Psychological Safety
items.text: Managing the anxiety, paranoia, and anhedonia (the inability to feel pleasure) that occurs when meth leaves the system.

items.title: 2. Physical Restoration
items.text: Addressing dehydration, malnutrition, and sleep deprivation under clinical supervision.

items.title: 3. 24/7 Monitoring
items.text: Ensuring vital signs are stable and providing immediate intervention for any stimulant-induced complications.

sections.heading: One Location. Every Level of Care.
body: Once you have achieved physical stability in detox, the real work of cognitive repair begins. At Des Moines Wellness Center, you won’t have to worry about the stress of moving to a new facility or meeting a new clinical team. We provide a full on-site continuum of care, allowing you to transition seamlessly through the levels of treatment required for lasting sobriety.

items.title: Residential Inpatient
items.text: Immersive Stabilization. Transition from detox into 24/7 structured care focused on intensive therapy and neuro-restoration.

items.title: Partial Hospitalization
items.text: Back to Real Life. High-level clinical support during the day while you begin practicing real-world coping skills.

items.title: Intensive Outpatient
items.text: Staying Sober Long-Term. Flexible sessions that support your return to the workforce or family life while maintaining your sober network.

sections.heading: Evidence-Based Therapies for Meth Recovery
sections.subheading: Therapeutic Modalities That Drive Lasting Change
body: Effective meth treatment requires specialized protocols designed to repair cognitive function and impulse control. We focus on neuro-restoration, helping the brain regain its natural ability to feel pleasure and stability. Our clinical team integrates the following evidence-based modalities into your treatment plan:
Addiction impacts the entire family unit. Our on-site sessions help loved ones understand the mechanics of stimulant recovery, heal past wounds, and set healthy boundaries for long-term success.

items.title: The Matrix Model
items.text: A highly structured framework specifically designed for stimulant addiction, combining behavioral therapy with family education.

items.title: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT)
items.text: Tools to identify environmental triggers and develop refusal skills to navigate high-risk situations safely.

items.title: Contingency Management
items.text: An incentive-based approach that helps jump-start the brain’s natural reward system through positive reinforcement.

items.title: Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT)
items.text: Specialized techniques to help manage emotional regulation and the distress tolerance needed during early sobriety.

sections.heading: Meth addiction Treatment & Dual Diagnosis
sections.subheading: Co-Occurring Disorder Care in Des Moines
body: Methamphetamine addiction is often intertwined with underlying conditions like depression, anxiety, or bipolar disorder. At Des Moines Wellness Center, our dual diagnosis approach treats the addiction and the mental health disorder simultaneously. We prioritize stabilizing stimulant-induced psychological symptoms, such as paranoia or psychosis, through comprehensive psychiatric evaluations and consistent medication management. By integrating these clinical interventions into our on-site continuum of care, we help you build the emotional regulation skills necessary to end the cycle of self-medication and achieve lasting stability.

sections.subheading: Your Local Network for Lasting Sobriety
body: Connection to the local community is vital for long-term success. These Greater Des Moines resources provide essential support for individuals and families navigating the recovery process.

items.title: Crystal Meth Anonymous (CMA) Iowa
items.text: Peer-led fellowship focused on stimulant recovery.

items.title: NAMI Iowa

items.title: Iowa Narcotics Anonymous (NA)
items.text: Local meetings in Ankeny, Urbandale, and West Des Moines.

faqs.q: How long does methamphetamine withdrawal last?
faqs.a: The initial “crash” typically begins within 24 hours of the last use and lasts about 48 hours. The acute withdrawal phase generally peaks between days 3 and 10, with most physical symptoms subsiding within two weeks. Because meth significantly impacts brain chemistry, psychological cravings and mood fluctuations can persist for several months.

While rarely fatal on its own, meth withdrawal carries high psychological risks, including severe depression, paranoia, and suicidal ideation. Medical detox at our Des Moines facility is essential to safely manage these emotional crises and prevent complications from the extreme exhaustion and nutritional depletion of the initial crash.

faqs.q: Are there medications to treat meth addiction?
faqs.a: There are currently no FDA-approved medications specifically for methamphetamine addiction. However, our clinical team may utilize certain medications to manage specific symptoms like insomnia, acute anxiety, or severe depression. This allows patients to stabilize enough to engage effectively in behavioral therapy.

The Matrix Model is an evidence-based framework specifically designed for stimulant recovery. It combines behavioral therapy, family education, and individual counseling into a highly structured schedule. It is considered the gold standard for meth treatment as it directly addresses the unique way stimulants affect the brain’s reward system.

Yes. We work with most major providers, including Blue Cross Blue Shield, Aetna, Cigna and more. Our admissions team provides free, immediate insurance verification to help you understand your coverage and minimize out-of-pocket costs. Call us at (888) 378-2158 to get a free verification.

sections.heading: Cocaine Rehab and Detox in Des Moines, Iowa
sections.subheading: Your Journey to Lasting Sobriety Starts Here
body: Methamphetamine addiction can feel like an inescapable cycle, but you don’t have to navigate the path to healing alone. At Des Moines Wellness Center, we specialize in the complex clinical needs of stimulant dependence, providing a safe environment to find stability. As a premier member of the Quadrant Health Group , our facility is backed by 10 years of clinical experience and a proven track record of helping individuals overcome high-acuity substance use disorders. This partnership allows us to offer a level of sophistication and continuity that is rare in the region, ensuring every patient benefits from a full on-site continuum of care.

From the initial hours of medical detox through our residential and outpatient programs, you remain with a consistent clinical team on a single Des Moines campus located near I-80 and I-235. We prioritize treating the whole person by integrating dual diagnosis expertise to address underlying mental health conditions alongside the addiction itself. By utilizing evidence-based protocols, we help rebuild the brain’s natural reward system while providing the local accessibility that families in Polk County need to stay involved. As a leading drug rehab in Iowa, we work with major insurance providers and facilitate same-day admissions, ensuring you can start your recovery immediately.

sections.heading: Let’s Build a Life You Don’t Need to Escape
body: Don’t let the weight of addiction decide your future. Whether you are seeking help for yourself or a loved one, our Des Moines admissions team is ready to provide the direct answers you need to move forward. We conduct a professional clinical assessment to find the best program for your needs while securing your private insurance benefits and job protection. Fill out the form below to get started, and a member of the team will reach out shortly.
